name: Fabrica
description: Plugin-raiz da Fabrica de Software. FSM, intake, dispatch, QA, security.

projectExecution.description: Plugin-level: parallel (each project independent) or sequential (one project at a time)

notifications.description: Per-event-type notification toggles. All default to true — set to false to suppress.

webhookPath.description: Plugin HTTP route path for GitHub App webhooks.

webhookSecretEnv.description: Environment variable containing the GitHub App webhook secret.

webhookSecretPath.description: Filesystem path containing the GitHub App webhook secret.

webhookMode.description: Controls GitHub webhook route registration behavior.

telegram.description: Telegram routing for DM bootstrap, project forum topics, and ops notifications.

bootstrapDmEnabled.description: Allow new-project bootstrap from Telegram DMs to the bot.

projectsForumChatId.description: Telegram forum group chat ID where Fabrica creates one topic per project.

projectsForumAccountId.description: Optional Telegram account ID to use when creating/sending project forum topics.

opsChatId.description: Telegram group/chat ID for cron, health, and ops-only notifications.

work_heartbeat.description: Token-free interval-based heartbeat service. Runs health checks + queue dispatch automatically.

maxPickupsPerTick.description: Max worker dispatches per agent per tick.
